title: Civilizations: Roma Invicta  - Classical civilizations pack
description: Step into antiquity with Civilizations: Roma Invicta, a resource pack inspired by the cultures and empires of the ancient world.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f04cede47ddfd42d5082b0453d9236dbe8c154e.png)


Transport your world into an age of glory and honor with the **Civilizations: Roma Invicta** resource pack.

---

# Villagers

Villagers have been completely reimagined, drawing inspiration from the classical civilizations that flourished across Europe and the Middle East in antiquity. Beyond the borders of the known world, additional cultures emerge from untamed jungles and remote swamps.

| Plains                                                                                 | Desert                                                                                 | Taiga                                                                                 |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Plains villagers are inspired by the Greco-Roman world.                                | Desert villagers draw from the cultures of the Levant.                                 | Taiga villagers reflect the frontier peoples along the Rhine.                         |
| ![Plains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9595cd7556544b0f1c5db1b96c70db97f57aa996.jpeg) | ![desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69cf77f1cc6bd93986f340d5f90abb86319a1914.jpeg) | ![Tiaga](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7871776dbf70fa1805402f1838d30254ab435434.jpeg) |

| Savanna                                                                                 | Jungle                                                                                 | Snowy                                                                                 | Swamp                                                                                 |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Savanna villagers take inspiration from North African cultures.                         | Jungle villagers are styled after civilizations of Central America.                    | Snowy villagers reflect the peoples north of the Rhine.                               | Swamp dwellers are rugged outsiders, shaped by the harsh wetlands they inhabit.       |
| ![Savanh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14df30efec8c38f858bf817e4ea735212cc674be.jpeg) | ![Jungle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b3a9a7edb9cb65f3752aa2930254fb76d5f4ec4.jpeg) |![Snow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c808c89c9b8d254235bdec4e4229209a98a83f.jpeg) | ![swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebd3f1947f1bbe768d9d720f5fd8f40945465ac2.jpeg) |

Each profession also features a distinct outfit familiar in function, yet authentically styled to reflect the world they inhabit.

---

# Trade and Protection

Wandering Traders and Iron Golems have also been given a new look, redesigned to better fit the classical aesthetic.

| Wandering Trader                                                                       | Iron Golem                                                                            |
| -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4617c3fc2039a06f5b3e4914242048fc5f76b762.jpeg) | ![Iron Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3d4e9e0148bf9037b31de30d910763379b5f434.jpeg) |

---

# Babies!

As of version **2.0.0** (Minecraft 1.26.x+), baby villagers now have unique skins, bringing even more life and detail to your settlements.

![Babies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb85543f8aed93d2a7b7afc2f3f8700c4e0444c4.jpeg)

---

# Illagers

Not all cultures of antiquity were friendly. Beware the reimagined Illagers, inspired by the so-called “barbarian” societies beyond the northern frontiers of Europe.

| Pillager                                                                                                        | Vindicator                                                                                                        | Evoker                                                                                                        |
| --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| ![Pillager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92b9eb31942f29e6a1922285ea9161bf33082402_0.webp) | ![Vindicator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ce71ee3d4a1c347c1969bc6172aee26582ee1b9.png) | ![Evoker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c42eb65924b84a7fd44a399cff0f8aa0a1c76c1.png) |
---

# Armor and Weapons

Immerse yourself fully in the ancient world with redesigned equipment:

* Chestplates and helmets take inspiration from the iconic **Lorica Segmentata** and **Galea** worn by Roman legionaries.
* Swords have been reworked to resemble the shorter, iconic **Gladius**.
* As of version **2.0.0**, sandals and tunics replace traditional leggings and boots for a more authentic look.

![Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1b9c7077164e0d062ae090cb4d1cd93f5691c2b.jpeg)

---

# UI Tweaks

The Hunger, XP, Health, and Armor bars have all been redesigned to better match the classical theme.

![Ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77f0c873673fd47a2c9cac49f561832028b7b9e2.jpeg)

---

# Splash Screen

The splash screen now features famous Roman quotes, presented in both Latin and some English translations.

![Splash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b78b1f09295f9871b540506ed4f29c4ea2e05e7.jpeg)

# Keep in touch!

If you have any feedback, suggestions, bug reports or just want to know what's coming next join us on our socials!
